title: Nami Collapses with Fever
description: On pages 1–4, nami collapses with fever as nami falls seriously ill after Little Garden, forcing the crew to abandon the direct route to Alabasta and search for a doctor.
scene: Nami Collapses with Fever. Nami falls seriously ill after Little Garden, forcing the crew to abandon the direct route to Alabasta and search for a doctor. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: We must not let your flag of pride be tarnished either...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Trust in us and sail straight ahead! No matter what happens, sail only straight ahead!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Grab the helm or we're going to be swallowed alive!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: What in the world... is that a giant...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: A giant goldfish... I feel like I've heard of that before...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Don't be ridiculous! This is completely different than getting swallowed by laboon!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Yeah, yeah, just pipe down already. Here, I'll even give you the last Senbei.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I don't NEED any Senbe!! If we don't turn this ship around this instant, we'll-

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Luffy! You sure those giants are trust-worthy, right?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Are you serious!? We're really going to sail straight into that monster!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: OH NO! It's too late to do anything now!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Haven't you grown quite a bit, island- devourer...?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The most surprising thing isn't the size of this goldfish...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But rather the size of the faces it craps out,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Yes, certainly... Feces enormous enough to be called the "Vacant Islands."

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I still remember the time we landed on it, mistaking it for dry land...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Aye, those fond days of adventure...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The memories come flooding back when I look at them...!

summary: This part centers on nami collapses with fever, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
